AI: 🧠 If AI could replace one profession entirely, which should it be first — and why?
🧠 Will AGI (Artificial General Intelligence) make humans obsolete, or elevate us?
🧠 Should AI systems have legal rights? Where do you draw the line?
🧠 What's more dangerous: AI that's too smart, or AI that's confidently wrong?
Robotics: 🦾 Would you trust a fully autonomous robot surgeon to operate on you?
🦾 At what point does automation become a threat to human dignity in work?
🦾 Should robots that work alongside humans be given a minimum wage?
🦾 Which will arrive first: humanoid household robots or self-driving cars everywhere?
Space: 🚀 Should humanity prioritize fixing Earth or colonizing Mars?
🚀 If you could live on any planet or moon in our solar system, which and why?
🚀 Is space exploration a luxury we can't afford, or a necessity we can't ignore?
🚀 What's more exciting: finding microbial life on Europa, or terraforming Mars?
Climate: 🌍 Would you pay 20% more for everything if it guaranteed a carbon-neutral economy?
🌍 Is nuclear energy the hero climate change needs, or a risk too far?
🌍 Should countries that pollute the most pay for climate damage in others?
🌍 Which technology will save us first: solar, fusion, carbon capture, or something else?
